title: Quest Alliance is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Quest Alliance is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quest Alliance family as a Subject Matter Expert in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quest Alliance:
Quest Alliance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance!
